result.summary: Kensho exposes public REST APIs documented on docs.kensho.com, including the LLM-ready API and other product APIs; the corpus also mentions MCP support, but does not provide a connect endpoint or authentication details sufficient to map a concrete MCP surface.

surfaces.name: Kensho public REST APIs
surfaces.notes: The docs state that Kensho's public-facing APIs use the REST architectural style and list product API areas including Scribe V2, S&P Global Agent Skills, Adaptive Retrieval, and Extract, but the corpus does not include machine-readable specs, base URLs, or enough authentication detail to separate them into concrete HTTP surfaces.
